scope.summary: Windows shipping_spool concurrency test failures: root-caused as Linux-calibrated wall-clock budgets measuring FlushFileBuffers latency (not flake, not the historical lost wakeup), fixed by asserting the non-blocking property with a gate instead of a stopwatch, and proven green on a hosted Windows CI run.
out_of_scope: the unrelated Oracle FREE 23ai matrix job that is red on the same run
any change to the spool's enqueue/forward ordering (unchanged; the property under test held)

entry_points.name: cargo test -p oraclemcp-audit --lib shipping_spool (Windows lane)
entry_points.trace: GitHub Actions run 29899848208, head 40b1f032 (contains fix 731b083a), job 'Rust workspace (Windows)' databaseId 88858118843, conclusion=success. Job log shows both previously-failing tests passing: 'shipping_spool::tests::concurrent_local_chain_stays_gap_free_while_shipping_is_stalled ... ok' and 'shipping_spool::tests::slow_destination_does_not_delay_durable_local_append ... ok', within a lib result of 'test result: ok. 231 passed; 0 failed'. This is the green Windows workspace run the acceptance required, after the unrelated red-main failures cleared.

entry_points.name: cargo test -p oraclemcp-audit --lib (local Linux stress)
entry_points.trace: Fix commit 731b083a replaces 150ms/1000ms wall-clock budgets with a GateForwarder that blocks the destination until the test opens the gate, so an append returning while delivered_records is still 0 provably did not wait for it (true at any machine speed). Each named regression test passed 50 consecutive exact runs (100 total) on Linux; cargo test -p oraclemcp-audit --lib = 244 passed; cargo clippy -p oraclemcp-audit --lib -- -D warnings passed. Gap-free 1..=8 local-chain assertion unchanged; a 30s bound remains only as a hang detector, not a performance threshold.

limitations: The Windows acceptance is cited from a hosted GitHub Actions runner; the exact-SHA query for 731b083a is empty because CI ran on later heads, so the citation is bound to head 40b1f032 which git confirms contains 731b083a as an ancestor.
The Oracle FREE 23ai matrix job is red on the same run for unrelated reasons and is explicitly out of scope; it does not affect the shipping_spool result.
